title: CAntiXray
description: CAntiXray is a lightweight anti-xray mod for Fabric 1.20.1-1.20.6 and 26.1.x. It works on dedicated servers and in singleplayer worlds, hiding ores until they’re exposed so xray cheats are ineffective without requiring a client mod.
body:
## Description
CAntiXray is a lightweight anti-xray mod for Fabric 1.20.1-1.20.6 and 26.1.x. It works on dedicated servers and in client singleplayer worlds, obfuscates vanilla ores (including ancient debris) in chunk data, then reveals real blocks when they're actually exposed. This makes xray cheats ineffective while keeping gameplay natural.

### Key Points
- Works on dedicated servers and in client singleplayer/integrated worlds.
- Players do not need the mod on the client in multiplayer.
- Configurable radius and block list.
- Supports overworld and nether ores, including ancient debris.
- Live chat commands: `/cantixray about`, `/cantixray logs`, and `/cantixray toggle`.

### Config
On first run it creates `config/cantixray.json`. You can edit:
- `enabled`: toggle on/off
- `revealRadius`: how close blocks must be to air/fluid to show
- `treatFluidsAsExposure`: reveal near water/lava
- `hiddenBlocks`: list of blocks to obfuscate

> **Note:** `/cantixray toggle` updates the config file immediately.

### Notes
- Lightweight and focused on server performance.
- Available for Minecraft `1.20.1-1.20.6` and `26.1.x`.
- The changelog has already been updated for the tested `26.1.2` support release.

### Dependencies

| | **1.20.1-1.20.6** | **26.1.x** |
|---|-------------|-----------------|
| Fabric Loader | `>=0.18.4`  | `>=0.19.2`      |
| Fabric API | `0.92.7+`   | `0.147.0+26.1.2`  |
| Minecraft | `1.20.1-1.20.6` | `26.1.2`          |
| Java | `17`        | `25`            |
